name: 15-Second Video Views
definition_short: Number of times a video ad was watched for at least 15 seconds (Meta ThruPlay) or 6 seconds (TikTok). Measures how many viewers stayed through the core message.
formula_readable: 15-Second Video Views = Meta ThruPlay count or TikTok 6-second view count
gotchas: TikTok uses 6-second views as the closest available threshold — not an exact match to Meta ThruPlay
Meta ThruPlay counts full plays for videos shorter than 15 seconds
